message.content:
@startuml
title 学生列表用例时序图

actor teacher 
participant "courseClass" as courseclass #CCCCFF  
participant S_C#CCCCFF   
student student2#CCCCFF    
database experimentscores#ccccff     
entity cexperiments#cccccc      
control experimentclauses#CCCCCC  

teacher ->> courseclass :根据工号以及默认学期获取\n所授课程开课班号及课程号 

activate courseclass
deactivate courseclass


courseclass->S_C:获取学生成绩及学号 


note right of S_C:S代表Student表，C是Course表。



S_C-->student2:获取学生信息 



return每个所受学生信息及其已批改实验平均成绩列表




frame点击成绩详情{
    note over teacher,courseclass,S_C,student2,experimentclauses:cexperiments,expermentscore
    
     participant ":cexperiments:"as CEXPERIMENTS1   <<Entity>> 
    
      activate CEXPERIMENTS1
      
       deactivate CEXPERIMENTS1
   
       
       
        
         loop for each item in list
            
            alt condition == true
                
                rect rgb(0, 56, 34)
                    title Internal Loop - positive case
                    
                     opt option==true
                        
                        repeat :do something;
                        
                            if (condition?) then(yes)
                                :something else;
                                
                                 stop
                             elseif(none left)then(nothing more to do )
                             
                              goto end
                              
                               endif
                               
                           endrepeat
                           
                       endrect
                       
                   else(condition fails from first check)
                   
                      break
                      
                  endloop:endlabel<font color=red>[break]</font>:when nothing remains to process or failure occurs during execution flow inside nested loops..etcetera...;;} } }} ;;}} }}}}}}]]] ]]> ]]>>> >>>>>>> >> > '''''''````` `` ` ```
